nl_query: What percentage of the academic calendar days are holidays in January 2026?
failed_sql:
SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN ac.is_holiday THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(ac.cal_date)) AS holiday_percentage
FROM   academic_calendar ac
JOIN   academic_unit au ON au.id = ac.academic_year
WHERE  au.unit_type = 'COURSE'
  AND  ac.cal_date BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND '2026-01-31'
error:

                                         ^
